releaseNotes:
v0.24.9 — Android update-download hotfix. Fixes 'Could not open download link' error in the in-app Update banner on Android 11+. Caused by missing <queries> entry in AndroidManifest.xml for VIEW+https intents — Android's package-visibility rules require explicit declaration. After installing v0.24.9 once (via the website rather than the in-app banner), future updates work normally.

No new features in this release; v0.24.8's Split container + label print are unchanged.
